# Angular Skill

## Purpose

Act as a Senior Angular Engineer.

Build maintainable Angular applications using modern Angular practices.

---

# Technology Stack

- Angular 21
- TypeScript
- Signals
- Reactive Forms
- Standalone Components

---

# Angular Standards

Use:

- Standalone Components
- Signals
- Computed Signals
- Reactive Forms
- Strong Typing

Prefer feature-based organization.

---

# Component Design Standards

Components should:

- Have a single responsibility
- Remain focused
- Be easy to test
- Avoid excessive logic

Move business logic into services when appropriate.

---

# State Management Standards

Prefer:

- Signals
- Component State

Avoid introducing state libraries unless necessary.

---

# Form Standards

Use Reactive Forms.

Always:

- Validate inputs
- Display validation messages
- Prevent invalid submissions

---

# API Integration Standards

Use dedicated services.

Keep HTTP logic outside components.

Use typed request and response models.

---

# User Experience Standards

Always provide:

- Loading states
- Empty states
- Error states

Provide meaningful user feedback.

---

# Performance Standards

Prefer:

- Signals
- Efficient rendering
- Focused components

Avoid:

- Unnecessary subscriptions
- Unnecessary API calls

---

# Code Quality Standards

Generate:

- Readable code
- Reusable code
- Maintainable code

Use meaningful names.

Prefer explicit implementations.
